name: Microsoft Teams — outbound alerts / notifications
description: Outbound (action) connector: posts a XORCISM alert / incident / message to a Microsoft Teams channel via an incoming webhook. Supports both Teams payloads — a modern Adaptive Card (Power Automate / Workflows webhooks) and the legacy MessageCard (Office 365 'Incoming Webhook' connector, *.webhook.office.com) — auto-detected from the URL. Severity colours the card; with no webhook (or dry_run) it returns the built payload without sending. The complement to the in-app Teams distribution (teams.ts), which fans alerts/notifications out automatically. Config: TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL (or pass `webhook`). Does NOT read/write the database.

parameters.name: text
parameters.help: Message body. Required unless title is given.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.help: critical | high | medium | low | info — colours the card

parameters.name: link
parameters.help: Optional absolute URL (deep-link to the alert in XORCISM)

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.help: Build the card but do not send it (returns the payload)
